description_long: This is a medium-sized, modern white bus with a black front windshield and side windows, featuring a satellite dish mounted on the roof and a large, realistic human head model protruding from the top. The bus has the branding 'The Roadfather' in red on both sides, and the front displays the IVECO logo. The side profile reveals a single passenger door and several rectangular windows, with the rear section containing ventilation grilles and the satellite dish. The wheels are black with visible hubcaps, and the bus has side mirrors and subtle panel lines. The overall design is sleek and urban, with a unique, eye-catching rooftop figure.
description: A modern white bus with black windows, 'The Roadfather' branding, a rooftop satellite dish, and a large human head model emerging from the roof.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black windshield, IVECO logo, side mirrors, and the human head model on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'The Roadfather' branding, satellite dish, single passenger door, and the head model's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back panel, ventilation grilles, satellite dish, and the back of the head model.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the window arrangement, 'The Roadfather' branding, and the head model's profile.
attribute_window_arrangement: Rectangular windows arranged in a single row along each side, evenly spaced, with a larger window at the front and smaller ones toward the rear.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: IVECO logo on the front center, silver text with a stylized winged emblem above.
